records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. Prepare for landing, Yuppie!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. Prepare for landing, Yuppie!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. Prepare for landing, Yuppie!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do I look like a plane to you?! How am I supposed to prepare for landing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do I look like a plane to you?! How am I supposed to prepare for landing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do I look like a plane to you?! How am I supposed to prepare for landing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is going oooooooon?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is going oooooooon?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is going oooooooon?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I thought I was going to die...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I thought I was going to die...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I thought I was going to die...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Playing airplane is fun! Let's call Grandpa and do it again later!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Playing airplane is fun! Let's call Grandpa and do it again later!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Playing airplane is fun! Let's call Grandpa and do it again later!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Over my dead body. Or more like, I will die if I do that again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Over my dead body. Or more like, I will die if I do that again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Over my dead body. Or more like, I will die if I do that again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to die young before even finding the treasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to die young before even finding the treasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to die young before even finding the treasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Teehee. Hardship makes the treasure all that more worth it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Teehee. Hardship makes the treasure all that more worth it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Teehee. Hardship makes the treasure all that more worth it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, there's nowhere to run now! Give up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, there's nowhere to run now! Give up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, there's nowhere to run now! Give up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever. Stupid. Stupid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever. Stupid. Stupid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever. Stupid. Stupid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not stupid! I'm smart because I'm Daddy's daughter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not stupid! I'm smart because I'm Daddy's daughter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not stupid! I'm smart because I'm Daddy's daughter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down. That thing isn't going to understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down. That thing isn't going to understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down. That thing isn't going to understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It can't get away anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It can't get away anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It can't get away anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You! Metal box! Surrender now unless you want us to beat you up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You! Metal box! Surrender now unless you want us to beat you up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You! Metal box! Surrender now unless you want us to beat you up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We only want the treasure. Give us the box, and we won't harm you. I promise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We only want the treasure. Give us the box, and we won't harm you. I promise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We only want the treasure. Give us the box, and we won't harm you. I promise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Unregistered identification. Please enter the administrator code to disable.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Unregistered identification. Please enter the administrator code to disable.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Unregistered identification. Please enter the administrator code to disable.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Administrator code?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Administrator code?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Administrator code?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Erm, well... Open sesame?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Erm, well... Open sesame?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Erm, well... Open sesame?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's awkward when you're quiet. Yell "stupid" again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's awkward when you're quiet. Yell "stupid" again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's awkward when you're quiet. Yell "stupid" again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Password incorrect. Security protocol activated.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Password incorrect. Security protocol activated.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Password incorrect. Security protocol activated.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Adjusting the combat level by 3 to overcome the situation.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Adjusting the combat level by 3 to overcome the situation.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Adjusting the combat level by 3 to overcome the situation.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was just a joke! Come on, don't people usually have four tries to get the password right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was just a joke! Come on, don't people usually have four tries to get the password right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was just a joke! Come on, don't people usually have four tries to get the password right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ohhhh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ohhhh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ohhhh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I feel powerful!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I feel powerful!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I feel powerful!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Wai
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Wai
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Wai
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tolerable threshold exceeded. All systems down. All systems down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tolerable threshold exceeded. All systems down. All systems down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tolerable threshold exceeded. All systems down. All systems down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Going into... power saving mode...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Going into... power saving mode...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Going into... power saving mode...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow. You're really merciless, Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow. You're really merciless, Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow. You're really merciless, Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You could've gone easier on it. The chest inside might be broken, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You could've gone easier on it. The chest inside might be broken, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You could've gone easier on it. The chest inside might be broken, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Yuppie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... didn't do anything just now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... didn't do anything just now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... didn't do anything just now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm surprised. I tried to get here as soon as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm surprised. I tried to get here as soon as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm surprised. I tried to get here as soon as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess I underestimated you, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess I underestimated you, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess I underestimated you, Yuppie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've done well making it this far. Both of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've done well making it this far. Both of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've done well making it this far. Both of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Titan aside, I did not expect you to get past ALT Squad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Titan aside, I did not expect you to get past ALT Squad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Titan aside, I did not expect you to get past ALT Squad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Vice President...? How did you come all the way here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Vice President...? How did you come all the way here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vice President...? How did you come all the way here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Well. I guess it's not really worth asking considering all the others we've encountered so far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Well. I guess it's not really worth asking considering all the others we've encountered so far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Well. I guess it's not really worth asking considering all the others we've encountered so far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Glad we can skip that part. We're not really close enough to rejoice in reuniting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Glad we can skip that part. We're not really close enough to rejoice in reuniting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Glad we can skip that part. We're not really close enough to rejoice in reuniting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Playtime ends here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Playtime ends here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Playtime ends here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Step away from the chest, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Step away from the chest, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Step away from the chest, Yuppie.
